description: A treasury analyst needs to determine the company's daily cash position to decide if funds need to be moved from a money market account to the operating account.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the closing balances from all company bank accounts from the previous day.
Retrieve a forecast of today's expected cash inflows (e.g., customer payments) and outflows (e.g., vendor payments).

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the daily cash forecast.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the projected end-of-day cash position.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates a projected deficit in the main operating account.

nodes.task_description: Initiate a wire transfer from the money market account to the operating account to cover the projected shortfall.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully initiates the required transfer.
